title: Cargo
description: A mod that adds more "realistic" automated water transport
body:
# Cargo

![the boat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/F3jOqOJ0/images/e8edc8094fa404dd096015035a5a314d2987c056.png)

Cargo is a simple mod that adds only one block, the cargo block.

Place a cargo block in any water biome (including beaches) and place another a boat ride away.

Click on one to set the destination, then the other to set the origin.

A time will be calculated and a small boat (you may need to relog if you are using any version before 1.1.0) will appear taking cargo from the origin to the destination
